name: @diegopetrucci/pi-extensions
description_en: A collection of pi extensions and skills for annotation UIs, context management, workflow audits, contrarian review, review-comment triage, notifications, brrr push alerts, safety guards, GitHub research, repo-local knowledge, todos, tool rendering, model
description_zh: 一组 pi 扩展和技能，用于注释 UI、上下文管理、工作审计、反向评论审查、评论分类、通知、brrr 推送警报、安全防护、GitHub 研究、仓库本地知识、待办事项、工具渲染、模型
